did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper focuses on orthorectification of skin nevi images using a 3D model of the human body built from depth scanners and high-resolution cameras. The methods described involve geometric corrections, image encoding indices, barycentric coordinates, and point cloud registration. While the authors mention future plans to implement image segmentation and nevi identification algorithms, the current study does not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning to obtain its results; it relies on geometric modeling and computer vision techniques for image reconstruction and measurement.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
